name: Internal Zone: Question Record Type
description: Record type used to associate Question with a specific zone

name: Internal Zone: Reply Record Type
description: Record type used to associate Reply with a specific zone

name: Progress
description: Measure achievement based on how much is finished compared to a targeted value. Ideal for tracking hard numbers and percentages. For example: Convert 50 Leads or Achieve 100% Customer Satisfaction.

name: Completion
description: Measure achievement based on whether or not the metric is finished. Ideal for tracking milestones, or when you don't have metrics based on hard numbers. For example: Become Salesforce Certified.

name: Internal Ideas: Idea Record Type
description: Record Type used to associate ideas with a specific community
